message: Node started: Develop an algorithm to determine the optimal sequence and spatial boundaries for the rectangles. Given the 10000x10000 grid and N points (xi, yi) with target areas Ai, implement a recursive quadtree-style decomposition or a sweep-line partitioning strategy. The goal is to divide the 10000x10000 space into N non-overlapping rectangular cells Ci such that each Ci contains its respective point (xi, yi). Use a priority queue to process points based on their target area Ai (e.g., largest area first) to ensure high-value advertisers are allocated space before the grid becomes too fragmented.
